landing.heroSubtitle: Transform your restaurant menu into an elegant digital experience. No app, no hassle — customers scan a QR and browse instantly.

challenge.label: Challenge & Solution
challenge.title: Restaurant businesses need an integrated digital solution
challenge.subtitle: Restaurants and cafés across the Arab region face mounting pressure — rising costs, fierce competition, and customers who expect a digital experience. Paper menus are no longer enough.

business.title: Today's market reality
business.p1: The hospitality sector in the Arab region is undergoing a major shift. Customers expect to browse menus on their phones, see current prices and offers, and order or reserve with ease. Meanwhile, restaurant owners juggle multiple branches, changing prices, and seasonal promotions — all with traditional tools.
business.p2: Smart Menu was built to bridge this gap: we understand restaurant business from the inside, and we build a simple tech solution that turns daily challenges into real growth opportunities — without technical complexity or high costs.

problem.title: Outdated, costly paper menus
problem.desc: Every price change or offer requires reprinting and redesign. The menu doesn't reflect reality, and customers notice.

solution.title: A live, instantly updated digital menu
solution.desc: Edit any item, price, or offer from your dashboard — changes appear instantly for all customers across every branch.

problem.title: Scattered operations across different tools
problem.desc: The menu is in one place, orders in another, reservations on paper or WhatsApp. No clear picture of how the restaurant runs.

solution.title: One platform for all restaurant operations
solution.desc: Menu, orders, reservations, cashier, and captain — all connected in one system you can monitor from a single place.

problem.title: No data to support your decisions
problem.desc: You don't know which items sell best, when peak hours are, or how promotions affect revenue.

solution.title: Analytics and reports that guide decisions
solution.desc: Track sales, orders, and reservations — understand what works so you can improve your menu and offers intelligently.

problem.title: Competition is accelerating and customers have options
problem.desc: Restaurants around you offer smooth digital experiences. If your menu feels outdated, customers perceive you as behind.

solution.title: A professional customer experience that sets you apart
solution.desc: A modern menu design, clear photos, search and filters, and QR on every table — an experience customers remember.

outcome.title: The result: a smarter restaurant, happier customers, stronger business
outcome.desc: When you solve these challenges with one integrated solution, you save time and money, improve customer experience, and build a solid foundation for growth. That's exactly what Smart Menu delivers.

about.label: About Us
about.title: Your technology partner in hospitality
about.p1: Smart Menu is a team specialized in building digital solutions for the restaurant and hospitality sector in the Arab region. We understand daily restaurant challenges — from updating prices and offers, to managing multiple branches and mobile customer experience.
about.p2: We build simple yet powerful tools that let restaurants fully control their menu from one place, delivering a professional experience without developing an app or investing in complex systems.

vision.label: Vision & Mission
vision.title: Where we're headed and why we exist
vision.visionText: For every restaurant and café in the Arab region to deliver a world-class digital experience — simple for the customer, smart for the business, and sustainable long-term.
vision.missionText: Empower restaurant owners to go digital at the lowest cost and complexity. We provide an integrated platform for menu management, orders, branches, and analytics — so restaurants can focus on what they do best: food and hospitality.

recommend.label: We Recommend
recommend.title: Digital menus over paper
recommend.subtitle: After working with dozens of restaurants, a digital menu isn't a luxury — it's a necessity. Customers expect mobile-first experiences, and restaurants need real-time control over offers and pricing.

instant.title: Instant updates, no reprinting
instant.desc: Change a price, add an offer, or pause an item — changes appear instantly without reprinting menus.

cost.title: Lower operating costs
cost.desc: Eliminate recurring printing and design costs. Invest once in a digital menu that serves you year-round.

experience.title: Better customer experience
experience.desc: Clear photos, fast search, dietary filters, and favorites — a smarter experience than traditional paper menus.

control.title: Full control from one dashboard
control.desc: Manage all branches, products, offers, and reservations from a single dashboard — no tech team required.

solution.label: Technical Solution
solution.title: Modern technology, simple experience
solution.subtitle: We deliver an integrated cloud platform combining smart QR codes, an interactive menu, and a full dashboard — all browser-based, no app required.

qr.title: QR & NFC
qr.desc: QR codes for every branch and table, with NFC card support for tap-to-open.

pwa.title: Interactive web menu
pwa.desc: Fast mobile experience without downloading an app — a modern PWA with full RTL support.

cloud.title: Secure cloud
cloud.desc: Your data on cloud servers with backups and automatic updates.

ops.title: Operations management
ops.desc: Orders, reservations, cashier, captain, and analytics — a complete restaurant operating system.

customers.label: Our Customers
customers.title: Who we serve
customers.subtitle: Our platform is built for every type of food & beverage business — from small restaurants to large chains.

restaurants.title: Restaurants
restaurants.desc: Family and mid-size restaurants with multiple branches

cafes.title: Cafés
cafes.desc: Coffee shops with fast mobile-first experience

foodTrucks.title: Food trucks
foodTrucks.desc: Quick, flexible solutions for mobile operations

features.title: Everything You Need
features.qrDesc: Generate QR for each branch and share with customers
features.menuDesc: Modern design with search, filters, and favorites
features.dashboardDesc: Manage products, categories, and branches easily

landing.ctaSubtitle: Join restaurants that have already gone digital. Sign up in minutes and get started.

footer.tagline: Smart digital menu solutions for restaurants and hospitality in the Arab region.
